hero_subtitle: A place where champions thrive from as early as four years old.
about_text: Founded by Madina Rakhim and Petr Pavlu, The Family Tennis is a Tampa Bay academy built on one mission — to nurture future professionals from the very first swing. Our passion is growing young athletes from childhood, giving them the foundation, discipline, and love for the game they need to compete at the highest level. With personalized coaching focused on both technique and mental strength, we guide every player from age 4 all the way to the pro stage.
